==== /.src/missingEffectContext_skipArrowDefaults.ts (0 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import { Effect, type RateLimiter } from "effect"
    
    const impl = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const banana = (rateLimit: RateLimiter.RateLimiter = (_) => _) => Effect.void
    
      yield* banana()
    })
